title: server_tool_use block 与 srvtoolu_ 前缀

body.concept: 当 Claude 调用由 Anthropic 服务器执行的工具（如 web_search）时，响应中会出现 `server_tool_use` block，其 id 以 `srvtoolu_` 开头。与客户端工具（client tool_use）不同，你不需要自己执行工具，也不需要返回 `tool_result`——API 在服务端自动执行，结果直接出现在同一个 assistant turn 中。
body.analogy: 好比你在餐厅点餐：客户端工具像外卖——服务员把菜单递给你，你自己去取。服务器工具像堂食——你只需要点菜，厨房做好直接端上来，你看到菜名（server_tool_use）和成品（result）出现在同一张桌上。

body_en.concept: When Claude invokes a tool executed by Anthropic's servers (e.g., web_search), the response contains a `server_tool_use` block whose id starts with `srvtoolu_`. Unlike client `tool_use` blocks, you don't execute the tool or return a `tool_result`—the API runs it server-side and the result appears in the same assistant turn automatically.
body_en.analogy: Think of it like dining in vs. takeout: client tools are takeout—the waiter hands you the order slip and you go pick it up yourself. Server tools are dine-in—you just order, the kitchen prepares it, and the dish (result) arrives at your table alongside the order ticket (server_tool_use).

diagram:
```mermaid
flowchart LR
    A([Start]) --> B[text block]
    B --> C[server_tool_use block]
    C --> D[server_tool_result block]
    D --> E[text block]
    E --> F([End])
    
    subgraph assistant_message[One Assistant Message]
        B
        C
        D
        E
    end
```
